text.message: Everyone is tied, went for brick, not personal sorry
You have a strong brick port and will likely lock longest too, I don't see the issue
Welp you just handed red a city
thats gonna be hard to stop
maybe if he can cut ur roads
Green u did the same trade
but seems like ur a lock to get road
Bruh blue what in the world lol
Me and you need to devs dude
Brother you gave him sheep, an ore, and a wheat
We are incredibly lucky for that 7
Jesus every single person going into a tantrum when they get robbed
You all are doing really well, deal with it lol
I'm done talking, my bad. Good luck
